passages.name: Start
passages.text: You stand at the beginning of the Labyrinth. This structure is intended to test bidirectional passage navigation (the `revertRun` server action). Please traverse deeply, turn back, and try alternate paths.

passages.name: Left Corridor
passages.text: The corridor is dark. You hear a sound ahead.

passages.name: Right Corridor
passages.text: The corridor is well-lit. There is a door ahead.

passages.name: END_LEFT
passages.text: You discovered the source of the sound. The labyrinth test is concluded.

passages.name: END_RIGHT
passages.text: You opened the door and found an exit. The labyrinth test is concluded.
